name: unicode_u1e9e_control_literal
description: Stable non-ASCII control U+1E9E (ẞ, capital sharp s): input GROẞ case-folds to groß, then the ligature fold rewrites ß→ss, matching literal "gross". #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
